    final com.viaversion.nbt.mini.MNBT
    getHeightMap()
    Client do not need a valid heightmap for rendering and gameplay to work Also even if we do cache real heightmaps they are not guaranteed to be correct as we do not have logic to rebuild or mutate heightmaps as block updates occur

    • generateEmptyHeightMap

      public static com.viaversion.nbt.mini.MNBT generateEmptyHeightMap()

    • getHeightMap

      public final com.viaversion.nbt.mini.MNBT getHeightMap()
      Client do not need a valid heightmap for rendering and gameplay to work Also even if we do cache real heightmaps they are not guaranteed to be correct as we do not have logic to rebuild or mutate heightmaps as block updates occur
